codeReview.summary: Clean, minimal 16-line addition to site/index.html. The new Validation Mode card is placed in the 'Evaluation & Comparison' card-grid alongside the existing Parameter Comparison Interface card. The card structure (card-header with card-letter and card-priority, card-title, card-desc, card-meta with colored dots) exactly mirrors the existing compare.html card pattern. The href points to validate.html which exists on disk. The description text matches the feature spec verbatim. The badge uses priority-tier1 styling (teal) consistent with Phase 3's card. No off-limits files were modified. Only index.html was changed, which is explicitly allowed per AGENTS.md. The worker verified the full e2e flow (index → validate.html → label → persist → reload), Mode 1 independence on port 8100, and manifest-to-disk consistency via both curl commands and agent-browser interactive checks.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker reported that agent-browser click command times out on card elements with complex nesting, requiring eval-based JS clicks as a workaround. This is a recurring pattern for agent-browser interaction with nested <a> elements containing multiple child divs. The skill procedure's Step 4 verification section doesn't mention this limitation or the eval workaround.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges: 'agent-browser click command times out on card elements with complex nesting - had to use eval for JS-based clicks instead'. handoff.verification.interactiveChecks[1]: 'Clicked Validation Mode card link (via JS eval)'

sharedStateObservations.observation: Transcript skeleton for this worker session contains 0 tool calls, which is unusual given the worker performed multiple verification steps. This may be a transcript logging gap rather than a convention issue.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session 7dc34baf-6a0d-45c2-b56e-871ececcc257 has toolCallCount: None and empty toolCalls array, despite handoff showing extensive curl commands and agent-browser interactions.

summary: Pass. The implementation is a clean, minimal 16-line addition to index.html that adds a Validation Mode card matching the existing card style exactly. The card links to validate.html with the spec-required description text and appropriate meta tags. The worker thoroughly verified the full e2e flow, Mode 1 independence, and manifest consistency via both CLI and browser-based checks. No code issues found.
